title: Preparation of plans and specifications; letting of bids for construction; supervision of construction
doc_html:
§808.  Preparation of plans and specifications; letting of bids for construction; supervision of construction

The department may prepare the necessary plans and specifications, may let the contract for bid, and may supervise the construction of the project.

Acts 1989, No. 451, §1, eff. June 30, 1989.
doc_text:
§808.  Preparation of plans and specifications; letting of bids for construction; supervision of construction
The department may prepare the necessary plans and specifications, may let the contract for bid, and may supervise the construction of the project.
Acts 1989, No. 451, §1, eff. June 30, 1989.
